title: Monteverdia lucayana
taxonomy: Monteverdia lucayana belongs to the family Celastraceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine or wax tree family. The genus Monteverdia is a part of this family and includes various species of plants native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Monteverdia lucayana is a specific species within this genus and family. The classification of Monteverdia lucayana is further supported by its botanical name and taxonomic classification.
